title: Vocabulary Card Schema
description: Schema for defining vocabulary flashcards in the French Language Coach application. Each card contains a French word/phrase, its English translation, and metadata for study and organization.

deck_id.description: Unique identifier for the deck/collection this card belongs to. Used for organizing and grouping related vocabulary cards.

card_id.description: Unique identifier for this card within the deck. Combined with deck_id, forms a globally unique identifier.

front.description: The French word, phrase, or text to be learned. This is what the user will see on the front of the flashcard.

back.description: The English translation of the French text on the front. This is what the user will see on the back of the flashcard.

example.description: A French sentence that uses the word/phrase in context. Helps the user understand how the vocabulary is used.

tags.description: List of categorization labels for filtering and organizing cards. Each tag should be a descriptive string.

context.description: Describes where the word appeared or was learned from. Can reference a lesson ID, session ID, or be free text (e.g., 'lesson:present-tense', 'session:123').

difficulty.description: Numeric rating indicating the difficulty level of this vocabulary card. 1 = easiest (common words), 5 = hardest (rare/specialized words). Used for study prioritization.
